category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Guinea EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入几内亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入幾內亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Guinea INGM standardization context, EDG grid coordination, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector direction, EMC IEC 61000 expectations, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与几内亚IGNM标准化环境、EDG电网协调、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、EMC IEC 61000预期，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與幾內亞IGNM標準化環境、EDG電網協調、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口方向、EMC IEC 61000預期，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Guinea, the practical question is less a mature EVSE certification pathway and more project feasibility: Guinea's EV market appears extremely limited, while grid deficits, low electrification, mining-load priorities, humidity, dust, and site power quality make public charging difficult without EDG coordination and project-specific engineering. Guinea uses a 220 / 380 V, 50 Hz electricity context, broadly closer to China's 220 / 380 V, 50 Hz baseline than Qatar, but exporters still need input-range, protection, earthing, surge, EMC, and derating evidence for the actual site. The likely connector direction for any IEC / Francophone tender is IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC; China GB/T 20234 connectors and GB/T 27930 DC communication are physically and protocol-incompatible and require hardware and firmware redesign. A Guinea-wide mandatory EV charger certification rule could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; verify the route with INGM, EDG, customs, the importer, and the project owner before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入几内亚时，核心问题与其说是成熟的EVSE认证路径，不如说是项目可行性：几内亚电动汽车市场似乎极其有限，电网缺口、低电气化率、矿业负荷优先、潮湿、粉尘和现场电能质量，使公共充电在没有EDG协调和项目级工程设计的情况下难以落地。几内亚电力环境为220 / 380 V、50 Hz，与中国220 / 380 V、50 Hz基线大体接近，但出口商仍须针对实际现场确认输入范围、保护接地、浪涌、EMC和降额证据。任何IEC / 法语区招标的接口方向很可能是交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2；中国GB/T 20234接口及GB/T 27930直流通信在物理和协议上不兼容，须进行硬件和固件重新设计。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认适用于全国EV充电桩的强制认证规则；出货前应与IGNM、EDG、海关、进口商和项目业主核实路径。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入幾內亞時，核心問題與其說是成熟的EVSE認證路徑，不如說是項目可行性：幾內亞電動汽車市場似乎極其有限，電網缺口、低電氣化率、礦業負荷優先、潮濕、粉塵和現場電能質量，使公共充電在沒有EDG協調和項目級工程設計的情況下難以落地。幾內亞電力環境為220 / 380 V、50 Hz，與中國220 / 380 V、50 Hz基線大體接近，但出口商仍須針對實際現場確認輸入範圍、保護接地、浪湧、EMC和降額證據。任何IEC / 法語區招標的接口方向很可能是交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2；中國GB/T 20234接口及GB/T 27930直流通訊在物理和協議上不兼容，須進行硬體和韌體重新設計。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認適用於全國EV充電樁的強制認證規則；出貨前應與IGNM、EDG、海關、進口商和項目業主核實路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INGM scope determination, EDG grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, investment recommendation, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, mining-site owners, and installers should verify current Guinea conformity assessment rules, EDG connection requirements, IEC standard editions, customs treatment, and site electrical conditions with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、IGNM适用范围裁定、EDG并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定、投资建议或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商、矿区业主和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行几内亚合格评定规则、EDG接入要求、IEC标准版本、海关处理和现场电气条件。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、IGNM適用範圍裁定、EDG併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定、投資建議或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商、礦區業主和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行幾內亞合格評定規則、EDG接入要求、IEC標準版本、海關處理和現場電氣條件。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
